title: Cost Accountant – Manufacturing (5 Days / Up to $5500 + AWS + Variable Bonus / Kallang)
description:
Job Description

Position: Cost Accountant (Manufacturing)

Well Established Singapore-Based SME

Working Hours: Monday – Friday (8.30am – 5.30pm)

Employment Type: Permanent (Full-Time)

Salary (commensurate with experience): Up to $5500 commensurate with experience + AWS + VB

Location: Kallang

Industry: Manufacturing

Job Responsibilities

  • Conduct costing analysis and identify opportunities to improve profit margins across business units
  • Analyse variances between actual, standard, and budgeted costs on a monthly basis
  • Manage and monitor costing issues, providing accurate variance analysis and recommendations
  • Generate periodic reports for management, presenting key insights on product costing, profitability, and cost drivers
  • Ensure timely and accurate financial reporting, including group-level reporting packs
  • Coordinate with relevant departments to prepare budgets and financial forecasts
  • Maintain effective collaboration with business partners and finance teams to support reporting and information flow
  • Undertake other ad hoc duties and projects as assigned

Key Responsibilities

  • Degree in Accountancy or a relevant professional accounting certification
  • At least 3 years of experience in cost accounting, preferably within a manufacturing environment
  • Proficiency in SAP is strongly preferred
  • Solid understanding of cost accounting principles and manufacturing workflows
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel and financial reporting tools

Email to: weeyee.ng@ascension-sg.com for more information.

***We do not charge our candidates any referral fee nor bind them with any contract. ***

Ng Wee Yee

Recruitment Consultant

Reg no.: R1982999

EA No: R25157837

postedCompany.description:
Empowering Businesses Through Integrated HR Solutions

Founded in Singapore in 2025, Ascension Advisory Pte Ltd is a trusted human resource solutions provider committed to helping organizations enhance their HR and business operations. We offer a comprehensive suite of reliable and scalable HR services tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients.

From inception to implementation, we partner closely with our clients, focusing on understanding their goals, developing effective strategies, and delivering high-quality solutions. Backed by the extensive knowledge and experience of our consultants, our mission is to drive long-term, sustainable results.

Our Areas of Expertise:
1) Recruitment & Executive Search
2) Foreign Manpower Solutions
3) Temporary & Contract Manpower Solutions
4) Human Resource Advisory & Consultancy
5) HR Business Process Outsourcing (BPO)
6) Learning & Development Consultancy
7) Corporate & Employee Insurance Consultancy

Let us be your partner in building a stronger, more agile workforce.
postedCompany.name: ASCENSION ADVISORY PTE. LTD.
